content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — app is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1-13) with demo credentials provided (demo_user.txt, demo_password.txt), but notes.txt contains only "n/a" with no instructions on reaching the subscription paywall/blocking features.
Pierre: Apple's reviewer will need explicit guidance to unlock the app's core functionality — here that means signing in and then reaching the "$4.99/month" subscription paywall (App/PaywallView.swift:9) that gates App blocking, schedules, and reports. A bare "n/a" note gives no path to test the IAP or paywall-gated features, risking a 2.1 rejection for incomplete review info. Update notes.txt to state the demo credentials work, describe how to reach the paywall, and clarify whether the reviewer should expect a live purchase flow or sandbox environment.
